description: Check order_id column exists with STRING data type
query: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'orders' AND column_name = 'order_id'

description: Check created_date column exists with DATE data type
query: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'orders' AND column_name = 'created_date'

description: Check amount column exists with FLOAT64 data type
query: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'orders' AND column_name = 'amount'

description: Check orders table has exactly three defined columns
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as col_count FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'orders'

description: Validate no null values exist in order_id column
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as null_count FROM `orders` WHERE order_id IS NULL

description: Validate order_id has no duplicate values
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as duplicate_count FROM (SELECT order_id FROM `orders` GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)

description: Validate no negative values exist in amount column
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as negative_count FROM `orders` WHERE amount < 0

description: Validate no null values exist in amount column
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as null_amount_count FROM `orders` WHERE amount IS NULL

description: Validate no null values exist in created_date column
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as null_date_count FROM `orders` WHERE created_date IS NULL

description: Validate created_date values are not future dates
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as future_date_count FROM `orders` WHERE created_date > CURRENT_DATE()

description: Check created_date is configured as table partition column
query: SELECT column_name FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'orders' AND column_name = 'created_date' AND is_partitioning_column = 'YES'

description: Check order_id and amount are not partition columns
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as wrong_partition_count FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'orders' AND column_name IN ('order_id','amount') AND is_partitioning_column = 'YES'

description: Check partition filter on created_date reduces scanned data
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as row_count FROM `orders` WHERE created_date = CURRENT_DATE()
expected_result: Query executes without full table scan, row_count >= 0

description: Check orders table uses DATE-based partitioning strategy
query: SELECT partition_id FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS` WHERE table_name = 'orders' LIMIT 5
expected_result: partition_id values follow YYYYMMDD DATE format

description: Check orders pipeline DAG imports with no errors
expected_result: DAG parsed successfully with no import errors

description: Check DAG is scheduled for daily execution
Check BigQuery operator task completes with success status
expected_result: Task state=success in Airflow task instance logs

description: Check DAG tasks have retry logic configured on failure
expected_result: retries >= 1 and retry_delay defined in default_args
